FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.40sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fc6774c2b90>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/07/17 21:17:37.759801990 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759806498 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759838207 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759839239 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759858104 {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759858986 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759871218 new <- list()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759871990 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759885094 new$width <- width
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759885906 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759902446 new$height <- height
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759903308 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759961138 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759963623 if (!missing(title))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759986265 new$title <- title
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759987397 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760002715 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760003587 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760017974 new$version <- version
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760018815 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760033843 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760034625 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760049332 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760050214 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760106478 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760108171 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760122688 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760123570 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760138928 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760141423 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760158124 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760159056 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760224279 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760234388 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760282405 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760283737 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760323438 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760332167 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760333069 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760343107 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760343588 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760352836 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760353286 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760366461 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760366902 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760376389 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760376850 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760388993 "default"))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760389464 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760398070 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760398521 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760406645 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760407096 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760447561 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760448834 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760464112 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760465144 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760479581 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760480433 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760493998 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760495090 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760509146 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760509627 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760519816 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760520277 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760529554 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760529995 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760558447 old$family <- family
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760559590 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760569207 version <- old$version
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760569678 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760579377 "2.0")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760579797 if (version %in% versions)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760588123 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760588563 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760606567 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760607529 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760623328 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760624200 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760639689 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760640210 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760652673 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760653134 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760665917 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760666428 invisible()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760675405 }

2026/07/17 21:17:37.759801990 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759806498 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759838207 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759839239 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759858104 {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759858986 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759871218 new <- list()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759871990 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759885094 new$width <- width
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759885906 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759902446 new$height <- height
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759903308 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759961138 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/07/17 21:17:37.759963623 if (!missing(title))

2026/07/17 21:17:37.759987397 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760002715 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760003587 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760017974 new$version <- version
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760018815 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760033843 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760034625 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760049332 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760050214 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760106478 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760108171 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760122688 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760123570 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760138928 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760141423 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760158124 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760159056 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760224279 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760234388 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760282405 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760283737 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760323438 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760332167 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760333069 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760343107 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760343588 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760352836 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760353286 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760366461 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760366902 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760376389 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760376850 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760388993 "default"))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760389464 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760398070 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760398521 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760406645 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760407096 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760447561 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760448834 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760464112 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760465144 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760479581 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760480433 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760493998 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760495090 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760509146 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760509627 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760519816 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760520277 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760529554 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760529995 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760558447 old$family <- family
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760559590 }
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760569207 version <- old$version
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760569678 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760579377 "2.0")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760579797 if (version %in% versions)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760588123 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760588563 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760606567 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760607529 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760623328 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760624200 domain = NA)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760639689 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760640210 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760652673 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760653134 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760665917 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760666428 invisible()
2026/07/17 21:17:37.760675405 }
